description: 基于行程数据的驾驶习惯评分分析：效率、平稳（事件计数）、速度（超速比例）、能量回收四维度

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_scores AS (
  SELECT
    p.drive_id,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power > 60 THEN 1 END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power < -30 THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * 3) AS regen,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - COUNT(CASE WHEN p.speed > 130 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 5)) AS spd
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
  GROUP BY p.drive_id, d.distance
),
drive_scores AS (
  SELECT
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - 1.0) * 200)) AS eff,
    COALESCE(ps.smooth, 100) AS smooth,
    COALESCE(ps.spd, 100) AS spd,
    COALESCE(ps.regen, 0) AS regen
  FROM drives d
  LEFT JOIN pos_scores ps ON ps.drive_id = d.id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
    AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(eff)*0.30 + AVG(smooth)*0.30 + AVG(spd)*0.20 + AVG(regen)*0.20)::integer AS "综合评分"
FROM drive_scores

panels.title: 驾驶风格
panels.description: 基于综合评分的驾驶风格分类

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_scores AS (
  SELECT
    p.drive_id,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power > 60 THEN 1 END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power < -30 THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * 3) AS regen,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - COUNT(CASE WHEN p.speed > 130 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 5)) AS spd
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
  GROUP BY p.drive_id, d.distance
),
drive_scores AS (
  SELECT
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - 1.0) * 200)) AS eff,
    COALESCE(ps.smooth, 100) AS smooth,
    COALESCE(ps.spd, 100) AS spd,
    COALESCE(ps.regen, 0) AS regen
  FROM drives d
  LEFT JOIN pos_scores ps ON ps.drive_id = d.id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
    AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(eff)*0.30 + AVG(smooth)*0.30 + AVG(spd)*0.20 + AVG(regen)*0.20)::integer AS "驾驶风格"
FROM drive_scores

panels.title: 效率分
panels.description:
理想续航消耗 vs 实际里程，权重30%
100分：实际能耗 ≤ 理想额定
0分：超出额定能耗100%

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (start_ideal_range_km - end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(distance, 0) - 1.0) * 200)))::numeric)::integer AS "效率分"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1
  AND start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL

panels.title: 平稳分
panels.description:
急加速+急刹车时间占比（功率>60kW 或 <-40kW），权重30%
100分：全程平稳
0分：≥100%时间急加速/急刹车（极度激进）

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - combined_pct))))::integer AS "平稳分"
FROM (
  SELECT
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power > 60 THEN 1 END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power < -40 THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS combined_pct
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
  GROUP BY p.drive_id
) t

panels.title: 速度分
panels.description:
超速采样点占比（速度>130km/h），权重20%
100分：无超速采样点
0分：20%以上时间超速

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - overspeed_pct * 5)))::integer AS "速度分"
FROM (
  SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.speed > 130 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS overspeed_pct
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
) t

panels.title: 回收分
panels.description:
能量回收比（回收能量÷消耗能量），权重20%
100分：回收比 ≥ 33%（积极单踏板驾驶）
0分：完全踩刹车，不使用能量回收

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(trip_regen))::integer AS "回收分"
FROM (
  SELECT LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * 3) AS trip_regen
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
  GROUP BY p.drive_id
) t

WITH pos_scores AS (
  SELECT
    p.drive_id,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power > 60 THEN 1 END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power < -30 THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * 3) AS regen,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - COUNT(CASE WHEN p.speed > 130 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 5)) AS spd
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
  GROUP BY p.drive_id, d.distance
),
drive_scores AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', d.start_date) AS day,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - 1.0) * 200)) AS eff,
    COALESCE(ps.smooth, 100) AS smooth,
    COALESCE(ps.spd, 100) AS spd,
    COALESCE(ps.regen, 0) AS regen
  FROM drives d
  LEFT JOIN pos_scores ps ON ps.drive_id = d.id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
    AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(eff)*0.30 + AVG(smooth)*0.30 + AVG(spd)*0.20 + AVG(regen)*0.20) AS "综合评分"
FROM drive_scores
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH pos_scores AS (
  SELECT
    p.drive_id,
    d.start_date,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power > 60 THEN 1 END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power < -30 THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))) AS smooth,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * 3) AS regen,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - COUNT(CASE WHEN p.speed > 130 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 5)) AS spd
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
  GROUP BY p.drive_id, d.distance, d.start_date
)
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', start_date) AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(smooth)) AS "平稳分",
  ROUND(AVG(spd)) AS "速度分"
FROM pos_scores
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH drive_regen AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS drive_id,
    date_trunc('day', d.start_date) AS day,
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - 1.0) * 200)) AS eff_score,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * 3) AS regen_score
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
    AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.id, d.start_date, d.start_ideal_range_km, d.end_ideal_range_km, d.distance
)
SELECT
  day AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(eff_score)) AS "效率分",
  ROUND(AVG(regen_score)) AS "回收分"
FROM drive_regen
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH pos_scores AS (
  SELECT
    p.drive_id,
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power > 60 THEN 1 END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN p.power < -30 THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS high_power_pct,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.speed > 130 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS overspeed_pct,
    LEAST(100, SUM(CASE WHEN p.power < 0 THEN ABS(p.power) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.power > 0 THEN p.power ELSE 0 END), 0) * 3) AS regen_score
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 1
  GROUP BY p.drive_id, d.distance
)
SELECT
  to_char(d.start_date, 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "出发时间",
  ROUND(d.distance::numeric, 1) AS "距离(km)",
  d.duration_min AS "时长(分)",
  d.speed_max AS "最高速(km/h)",
  ROUND(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - 1.0) * 200))::numeric) AS "效率分",
  ROUND(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - COALESCE(ps.high_power_pct, 0)))::numeric) AS "平稳分",
  ROUND(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - COALESCE(ps.overspeed_pct, 0) * 5))::numeric) AS "速度分",
  ROUND(COALESCE(ps.regen_score, 0)::numeric) AS "回收分",
  ROUND((
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - GREATEST(0, (d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) / NULLIF(d.distance, 0) - 1.0) * 200)) * 0.30 +
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - COALESCE(ps.high_power_pct, 0))) * 0.30 +
    LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 100 - COALESCE(ps.overspeed_pct, 0) * 5)) * 0.20 +
    COALESCE(ps.regen_score, 0) * 0.20
  )::numeric) AS "综合评分"
FROM drives d
LEFT JOIN pos_scores ps ON ps.drive_id = d.id
WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
  AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND d.distance > 1
  AND d.start_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND d.end_ideal_range_km IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.start_date DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: 驾驶数据汇总
panels.description: 当前时间范围内的行程统计数据

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS "总行程数"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT ROUND(SUM(distance)::numeric, 0)::integer AS "总里程(km)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT ROUND(AVG(distance)::numeric, 1) AS "平均行程(km)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT ROUND(MAX(distance)::numeric, 1) AS "最长行程(km)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT MAX(speed_max)::integer AS "最高时速(km/h)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

SELECT ROUND(SUM(duration_min) / 60.0, 1) AS "总驾驶时长(h)"
FROM drives
WHERE car_id = $car_id
  AND $__timeFilter(start_date)
  AND end_date IS NOT NULL
  AND distance > 1

list.definition:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text 
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;
list.label: 车辆
list.name: car_id
list.query:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text 
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;

title: 驾驶评分
